headline: Arista Networks Deserves a Closer Look

The company benefits from a structural lag in AI infrastructure buildouts, reflected in its ballooning deferred revenue and significant backlog, and is well-positioned to capitalize on the industry's pivot from proprietary InfiniBand to open-standard Ethernet for AI clusters.
